title: Recubrimientos para pisos industriales para el bienestar animal - Elite Mexico
content:
Animal Wellness
Our flooring systems for the animal wellness industry are durable, abrasion resistant coatings. These antimicrobial surfaces are also chemical and stain resistant against common cleaners as well as biological animal waste.
Advantages
Seamless, non-permeable and antimicrobial surfaces
Scratch resistant, withstands animal claws and teeth
Integrated cove base and vertical applications available for wall protection
Chemical and thermal shock resistant for areas subject to steam cleaning
Resistant to animal waste, including medicated urine
Highly chemical resistant, optional ‘novolac coatings’
Coefficient of friction (COF) meets and exceeds ADA Flat & Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA requirements
Veterinary offices
Waiting room and lobbies
Exam rooms
Kennels & daycares
Grooming areas
Laboratory facilities
Livestock areas
Sterilization room
X-ray and MRI facilities
Restrooms and breakrooms
Mechanical closet
Urethane Cement
